home.name: Stefano
home.personal_text: My name is Stefano. I am a student with a passion for computer science and technology. I enjoy programming, experimenting with new projects and continuously learning new skills in the world of software development.
home.work_text: I am in my fifth year at the State Technical Industrial Institute "A. Artom" — Computer Science and Telecommunications programme.

personal.title: Personal Life
personal.subtitle: Who I am, where I come from, what I am passionate about
personal.about_text: I am Stefano Catalin D'Alessandro, born and raised in Piedmont in the province of Asti, where I currently attend the I.T.I.S. "A. Artom". In my spare time I enjoy learning about new programming topics, especially web development. I also like meeting up with friends and playing video games.
personal.passion1_text: My way of relaxing and taking a break from everything.
personal.passion2_text: I ride mountain bikes on my own or with a few friends, and I have been swimming since childhood.
personal.passion3_text: My way of unwinding and switching off from the world.
personal.story_text: My passion for computer science started before I enrolled at Artom — I had always been comfortable around computers. Since beginning my studies I have learnt a great deal across all the relevant subjects, from programming to setting up and managing networks. I have yet to finish my studies and I intend to continue with a degree in Computer Engineering, unless another opportunity comes along.

work.title: Work Life
work.subtitle: My career, my skills, my journey
work.skill1_desc: Strong proficiency with the Windows operating system.
work.skill2_desc: Good knowledge of C# and Windows Forms applications.
work.skill3_desc: Good knowledge of Python for exercises, scripts and study.
work.skill4_desc: Intermediate knowledge of the C programming language.
work.skill5_desc: Intermediate knowledge of the C++ programming language.
work.skill6_desc: Foundational knowledge of semantic web page structure.
work.skill7_desc: Foundational knowledge of styling, layout and responsive design.
work.skill9_desc: Working knowledge of AI tools to support study and programming.
work.skill11_desc: Good knowledge of the Microsoft Office suite.
